title: Conversion-Focused Web Design Basics
excerpt: Why most websites fail to convert and how to fix it with structure, clarity, and intent.
author: DeepDigital

content.text: Most websites fail because they prioritize aesthetics over clarity.
Users do not read websites in a linear way. They scan for relevance, proof, and direction.

content.caption: A clearer structure reduces decision friction.

content.text: A beautiful website that does not help users decide is still underperforming.
